home.title: Welcome to Intiva
home.subtitle: Your vehicle financing solution
home.heroDescription: Get the best interest rate and payment plan that suits you. All in one place, fast and hassle-free.
home.benefit1Desc: Optimized process to give you a response in record time. Forget long waits and get your credit approved in minutes.
home.benefit2Desc: Clear conditions and interest rates adjusted to your credit profile. No fine print or surprises.
home.benefit3Desc: Configure your down payment and payment term according to your comfort. You decide how much to pay and for how long.
home.step1Desc: Explore our catalog and select the ideal vehicle for you.
home.step2Desc: Use the simulator to adjust payments and terms according to your budget.
home.step3Desc: Analyze the detailed schedule of your installments, interest, and insurance.
home.step4Desc: Sign the documents and receive the keys to your new car.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
profile.accountInfoDesc: Update your name, phone number, and address.
profile.name: Full name
profile.paymentMethodsDesc: Manage your linked accounts and cards.
profile.helpSupportDesc: Contact our team or view FAQs.
profile.faq1Q: How can I apply for a vehicle credit?
profile.faq1A: Log in, select a vehicle from the catalog, and use the credit simulator to configure your payment plan. Then follow the steps to complete your application.
profile.faq2Q: What are the requirements to finance a vehicle?
profile.faq2A: Requirements include: a valid ID or passport, minimum income of S/1,500, no past-due debts in the financial system, and being between 18 and 70 years old.
profile.faq3Q: How long does credit approval take?
profile.faq3A: The approval process can take between 24 and 48 business hours, provided you submit all required documentation completely and correctly.
profile.faq4Q: Can I pay off the credit early?
profile.faq4A: Yes, you can make full or partial early payments without penalties. Any extra payment reduces the principal balance and future interest.
profile.faq5A: Vehicle insurance covers accident damage, total or partial theft, fire, and third-party liability. You can contract it directly with us.
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

settings.errorMinPositive: The minimum amount must be greater than zero
settings.teaRateConfigDesc: Configure the annual effective rates (TEA) according to the client's risk profile.
